org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard

Class StandardGraph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractModelObject
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard.StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>
  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graph.
    N - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    A - is the type of the anchors inside the graph.
    E - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ModelObject>, Graph<G,N,A,E>, ModelObject, PropertyNames
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FiniteStateMachine

    public class StandardGraph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
extends AbstractModelObject
implements Graph<G,N,A,E>
    Define a graph with the standard implementation.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-formalism

      Get the edges classified by their names.

      Get the first edge that has the specified name.

      Get the edge that has the specified identifier.

      Replies the number of edges in the graph.

      Replies the names of the edges in a single collection.

      Get the edges classified by their names.

      Get the nodes classified by their names.

      Get the first node that has the specified name.

      Get the node that has the specified identifier.

      Replies the number of nodes in the graph.

      Replies the names of the nodes in a single collection.

      Get the node's list of this Graph
      Map<String,Set<N>> getNodesByName()
      Get the nodes classified by their names.
      Set<N> getNodesByName(String name)
      Get the nodes that have the specified name.
      boolean isEmpty()
      Replies if this graph has no node nor edge inside.
      int moveFromGraph(G graph)
      Move all the model objects from the specified graph to the current graph.
      int moveFromGraph(G graph, Set<UUID> identifiersToExtract)
      Move all the model objects from the specified graph to the current graph.
      void removeEdge(E edge)
      Remove a edge attached to this Graph.
      (package private) void removeEdgeSilently(E edge)
      Remove the specified edge with no notification to the outside of the graph.
      void removeNode(N node)
      Remove a node attached to this Graph All the link to other objects of the graph are also broking.
      (package private) void removeNodeSilently(N node)
      Remove the specified node with no notification to the outside of the graph.

      • isEmpty

        public boolean isEmpty()
        Replies if this graph has no node nor edge inside.
        Specified by:

        Returns:
        true if the graph has no node nor edge inside; otherwise false.

        Replies the number of nodes in the graph.

        the number of edges in the graph.

      • findModelObject

        public ModelObject findModelObject(UUID id)
        Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id. This method goes through all the model objects and sub-model objects.
        Specified by:
        findModelObject in interface ModelObject
        Returns:
        the object with the specified id, or null.

        Returns:

        Returns:
        a list of Nodes.

      • getNodesByName

        public Map<String,Set<N>> getNodesByName()
        Get the nodes classified by their names.
        Specified by:
        getNodesByName in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Returns:
        the map of the pairs name-nodes.

      • getNodeNames

        public Set<String> getNodeNames()
        Replies the names of the nodes in a single collection.
        Specified by:
        getNodeNames in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Returns:
        all the names of the nodes in this graph.

      • getNodeByName

        public Map<String,N> getNodeByName()
        Get the nodes classified by their names. If two or more nodes have the same name, only one is replied.
        Specified by:
        getNodeByName in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Returns:
        the map of the pairs name-node.

      • addNode

        public void addNode(N node)
        Add a node in this Graph.
        Specified by:
        addNode in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Parameters:
        node - the new Node.

      • removeNode

        public void removeNode(N node)
        Remove a node attached to this Graph All the link to other objects of the graph are also broking.
        Specified by:
        removeNode in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Parameters:
        node - the Node to remove.

      • removeNodeSilently

        void removeNodeSilently(N node)
        Remove the specified node with no notification to the outside of the graph.
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to remove.

        Get the edges classified by their names.

        getEdgesByName in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Returns:
        the map of the pairs name-edges.

      • getEdgeByName

        public Map<String,E> getEdgeByName()
        Get the edges classified by their names. If two or more edges have the same name, only one is replied.
        Specified by:
        getEdgeByName in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Returns:
        the map of the pairs name-edge.

        Get the edge that has the specified identifier.

      • addEdge

        public void addEdge(E edge)
        Add a Edge in this Graph
        Specified by:
        addEdge in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Parameters:
        edge - the new Edge.

      • removeEdge

        public void removeEdge(E edge)
        Remove a edge attached to this Graph. All the link to other objects of the graph are also broking.
        Specified by:
        removeEdge in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Parameters:
        edge - the Edge to remove.

      • removeEdgeSilently

        void removeEdgeSilently(E edge)
        Remove the specified edge with no notification to the outside of the graph.
        Parameters:
        edge - is the edge to remove.

      • moveFromGraph

        public int moveFromGraph(G graph)
        Move all the model objects from the specified graph to the current graph. This function preserve the connections between the moved objects.
        Specified by:
        moveFromGraph in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Parameters:
        graph - is the graph from which the objects should be moved.
        Returns:
        the number of objects that were moved.

      • moveFromGraph

        public int moveFromGraph(G graph,
                Set<UUID> identifiersToExtract)
        Move all the model objects from the specified graph to the current graph. This function preserve the connections between the moved objects.
        Specified by:
        moveFromGraph in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
        Parameters:
        graph - is the graph from which the objects should be moved.
        identifiersToExtract - are the identifiers to extract and move into the current graph.
        Returns:
        the number of objects that were moved.

      • clear

        public void clear()
        Clear the graph content. This function preserve the connections between the removed objects.
        Specified by:
        clear in interface Graph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
